workflow_runs.name: Pre-commit Checks
workflow_runs.display_title: fix: add both #nosec (bandit) and #noqa (ruff) on same lines

head_commit.message:
fix: add both #nosec (bandit) and #noqa (ruff) on same lines

Bandit uses #nosec, ruff uses #noqa. Some lines were converted to
only #noqa, breaking bandit. Now both annotations coexist.
